benefits.title: Why choose IntensivaAR?
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need to achieve your academic goals, all in one place.
benefits.b1_desc: Learn in real time with the best teachers in Argentina. Ask questions, participate, and get instant answers.
benefits.b2_desc: Access PDFs, study guides, practice exercises, and mock exams for every course.
benefits.b3_desc: Choose between summer or winter courses with schedules that adapt to your agenda.
benefits.b4_desc: Earn a verified digital certificate when you complete each course and pass the assessment.

categories.title: Explore by category
categories.subtitle: Find the perfect course among 500+ options organized by field of study.

seasons.verano_title: Make the most of your break
seasons.verano_desc: Intensive courses in January and February. Catch up on pending subjects or get ahead of the semester.
seasons.invierno_desc: During the winter break, dive deeper into challenging subjects with high-intensity courses.

how_it_works.title: How does it work?
how_it_works.subtitle: Start learning in 3 simple steps. No complications.
how_it_works.s1_desc: Browse our catalog and filter by subject, modality, location, and date.
how_it_works.s2_desc: Check teachers, student reviews, curricula, and prices to choose the best fit.
how_it_works.s3_desc: Complete your registration in minutes and start learning right away.

testimonials.title: What our students say
testimonials.subtitle: Thousands of students already trust IntensivaAR to achieve their academic goals.
testimonials.t1_quote: The intensive summer classes saved me. I passed Mathematical Analysis with a 9 and no stress. The teachers are incredible.
testimonials.t2_quote: The best platform to prepare for the CBC. The study material is complete and the live classes are very interactive.
testimonials.t3_quote: I started the English course from scratch and in 6 weeks I could already hold a basic conversation. 100% recommended.

pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your needs. No hidden costs.
pricing.teachers_desc: Publish your courses on the platform

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our courses and the platform.
faq.a1: An intensive course is a concentrated academic program that allows you to learn a subject in a short period (usually 2 to 6 weeks). Classes have a higher daily workload and are designed for fast and effective learning.
faq.a2: Both modalities are available. Live classes are taught via Zoom with expert teachers and are recorded so you can watch them anytime. We also offer 100% asynchronous courses.
faq.a3: No. Most of our courses are designed to start from scratch. Each course indicates the required level in its description. For advanced courses, prerequisites are specified.
faq.a4: Upon completing a course and passing the final assessment, you receive a verified digital certificate from IntensivaAR. Premium courses include certification at no extra cost.
faq.a5: Yes, you can cancel your Premium subscription at any time from your profile. There are no penalties or cancellation fees. You'll keep access until the end of the billing period.
faq.a6: Yes, we offer special discounts for groups of 3 or more students, and for educational institutions. Contact us by email for a personalized quote.

newsletter.title: Start today
newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter and receive news, exclusive discounts, and study tips directly in your inbox.
